ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Continued To Feb-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for Julia Fong.

Mr. Huster reported that it is ready to be filed and that they need a 2 week continuance. The status on close of the estate was continued to February 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for and with Julia Fong.

Mr. Huster noted that the other four Siblings were present. Ms. Fong stated that the Mother passed away in 1991. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)
